mentions.note: Down 40% last year, up 5% YTD, trading 34x earnings at four-and-half-year low; warming up to stock with franchise at reduced price; reports Feb 3rd, could retrace to $30 low to buy more.
Stock so low it might bounce even if quarter isn't spectacular; may not matter but stock too low.

Turnaround executing: menu innovation (Chicken al Pastor, 4 new proteins) driving traffic and frequency. Aggressive buyback ($2B in 2025, $1.8B more authorized). In-store operations improving; new CMO, CDO, VP Tech hires fuel 2026 growth.
Down 40% since 2024 split but operations improving; trading 30x earnings with positive Scott impact; better to buy here than sell despite restaurant group out of favor from oil spike.
Stock marking time since reporting but fundamentals improving under CEO Scott Boatwright; hold for turnaround but restaurant group pressured by gas prices.
At $30 (down 20% YTD, 50% from highs); crunch time; must deliver better-than-expected Q1 earnings (April 29 deadline) to stabilize.
100X data shows positive future purchase intent trends; new CEO Scott Boatwright addressing value gap vs. competitors; buy here—momentum can continue.
Could have first strong quarter in very long time.
